title: Ivalunga Imsai Thaanga Mudiyala Lyrics Kalakalappu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Ivalunga Imsai Thaanga Mudiyala
Singer: Amitabh Narayan
Movie: Kalakalappu @ Masala Cafe

Music: Vijay Ebenezer
Lyricist: Pa.Vijay

Azhaga azhaga sirukuraaluga
adudha nodiye morakiraaluga
usura usura nenaikuraaluga
udane udane marakuraaluga
experience ...

Ivaluga imisa thaangamudiyala
ivaluga ilaamalum, irukamudiyala (2)

Munnadi pona idikuraaluna
pinnadi pona odhaikuraaluga
ennapanuradhu ennapanuradhu
dharmaendhra

kuthunga yesamaan kuthunga - indha
ponnungale ippadithaan kuthunga (2)

Ivaluga imisa thaangamudiyala
ivaluga ilaamalum, irukamudiyala

Lip-la lipstic potukura
heart-ula helmet maatikura
ivaluga imisa o oh o..

Polapa keduthu deal viduva
porupa irunnum feel pannuva
ivaluga imisa o oh o..

Kannadhasanum sonnar
ada kamalahaasanum sonnar
water bottle-ayum
quater bottle-ayum
pirika mudiyuma paaru

unna solli kuthamilla
enna solli kuthamilla
kadhaloda kutham thaanada

kuthunga yesamaan kuthunga - indha
ponnungale ippadithaan kuthunga (2)

Ivaluga imisa thaangamudiyala
ivaluga ilaamalum, irukamudiyala

Adhuku siripa theriyalaye
erinju viluva puriyalaye
ivaluga imisa...

Aarambam love-la adhirumada
boogambam appuram kilambumada
imisa imisa..

Ada india-vil thaanda
dhammu adhigam vikkudhaam yenda ?
pugaya vittuthaan polambi thavikura
aangal kottithaal thaanda

love-kulla maatinaalum
stove-kulla maatinaalum
theenji povom
maapillangala!!

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the release year of the song Ivalunga Imsai Thaanga Mudiyala?

The song was released in 2012.

Who is the singer of Ivalunga Imsai Thaanga Mudiyala?

The song is sung by Amitabh Narayan.

What is the theme of the movie Kalakalappu?

The movie Kalakalappu is a comedy that revolves around the humorous events in a small-town cafe.

Who composed the music for Ivalunga Imsai Thaanga Mudiyala?

The music was composed by Vijay Ebenezer.

What mood does the song Ivalunga Imsai Thaanga Mudiyala convey?

The song conveys an upbeat and energetic mood.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Ivalunga Imsai Thaanga Mudiyala from the movie Kalakalappu is a lively and energetic song that captures the essence of fun and celebration. Sung by Amitabh Narayan, the song features catchy lyrics by Pa Vijay and vibrant music by Vijay Ebenezer. It fits perfectly within the comedic and light-hearted theme of the movie, adding to the overall joyous atmosphere. The song's upbeat tempo and engaging rhythm make it a favorite for parties and celebrations, evoking feelings of happiness and excitement.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Ivalunga Imsai Thaanga Mudiyala from the movie Kalakalappu. Sung by Amitabh Narayan, this track perfectly blends Vijay Ebenezer's lively music with Pa Vijay's catchy lyrics. Dive into a world of fun and rhythm that will make you want to dance along!
stanzaMeanings: Music: Vijay Ebenezer Lyricist: Pa.Vijay
Beautiful, beautiful, they talk sweetly, but in a moment they change their mind. They think of you deeply, but soon forget.
experience ...
These girls' troubles are unbearable, but can't live without them either.
If you go forward, they scold you; if you go back, they hit you. What to do, what to do, Dharmaendra.
Dance, yes man, dance - these girls are like this.
These girls' troubles are unbearable, but can't live without them either.
Putting lipstick on lips, wearing a helmet on the heart, these girls' troubles, oh oh oh..
They ruin the situation and make a deal, they feel responsible, these girls' troubles, oh oh oh..
Even Kannadasan and Kamal Haasan said, can you separate a water bottle from a quarter bottle?
No fault in blaming you, no fault in blaming me, it's love's fault.
Dance, yes man, dance - these girls are like this.
These girls' troubles are unbearable, but can't live without them either.
Don't know how to smile, don't understand the value, these girls' troubles...
In the beginning, love shakes like an earthquake, then it starts, troubles, troubles..
In India, there's a lot of courage, why? Men suffer and complain, but still gather.
Even if caught in love or caught in a stove, we will burn, oh grooms!
Dance, yes man, dance - these girls are like this.
These girls' troubles are unbearable, but can't live without them either.
If you go forward, they scold you; if you go back, they hit you. What to do, what to do, Dharmaendra.
Dance, yes man, dance - these girls are like this.
